name: Calendar Subscription
description: Subscribe to a public iCalendar (.ics) URL and display upcoming events on your board.
author: FiestaBoard Team

calendar_url.title: Calendar URL
calendar_url.description: Public iCalendar (.ics) subscription URL. Supports https:// and webcal:// formats.

minutes_before.title: Minutes Before Event
minutes_before.description: How many minutes before an event starts to trigger the board display.

display_duration_minutes.title: Display Duration (minutes)
display_duration_minutes.description: How long to keep the event on the board after triggering. Set to 0 to stay until something else overwrites it.

timezone.title: Timezone
timezone.description: IANA timezone for interpreting all-day events and formatting display times.

max_events.title: Max Events to Show
max_events.description: Maximum number of upcoming events to expose as template variables.

refresh_seconds.title: Refresh Interval (seconds)
refresh_seconds.description: How often to re-fetch the calendar URL.

env_vars.name: CALENDAR_SUB_URL
env_vars.description: Calendar subscription URL (can also be set in UI)

event_name.description: Name/title of the next upcoming event

event_start.description: Formatted start time of the next event (e.g., '3:30 PM')

event_start_date.description: Formatted start date of the next event (e.g., 'Apr 3')

event_end.description: Formatted end time of the next event

event_location.description: Location of the next event (if set in calendar)

event_description.description: Description of the next event (truncated to 22 chars)

minutes_until.description: Minutes until the next event starts (negative if in progress)

is_now.description: Whether an event is currently in progress

event_count.description: Number of upcoming events loaded from the calendar

screenshots.alt: Calendar Subscription displayed on a Vestaboard
screenshots.caption: Upcoming event triggered on the board before the event starts
